facebook.content:
"The Lord gave this charge to Jeremiah son of Hilkiah, one of the priests at the temple of the Lord in Anathoth in the land of Benjamin, saying, 'Stand at the gate of the Lord's house and there declare all this word, and say, Hear the word of the Lord, all people of Judah who enter by these gates to worship the Lord.'

As the Lord's people, we are gatekeepers of His Kingdom, entrusted with declaring His word and representing His authority to the world around us.
facebook.fullPost:
"The Lord gave this charge to Jeremiah son of Hilkiah, one of the priests at the temple of the Lord in Anathoth in the land of Benjamin, saying, 'Stand at the gate of the Lord's house and there declare all this word, and say, Hear the word of the Lord, all people of Judah who enter by these gates to worship the Lord.'

As the Lord's people, we are gatekeepers of His Kingdom, entrusted with declaring His word and representing His authority to the world around us.

Start your Kingdom journey
https://increasingfaith.net/journey.html

#KingdomCitizen #IFM #IncreasingFaith

instagram.content:
"But we have this treasure in jars of clay, to show that the surpassing power belongs to God and not to us."

(2 Corinthians 4:7)

We often see the Church through the lens of its frailty, but Scripture reveals a different reality. God's authority and power are not diminished by our earthly weaknesses; they are made evident through them.

tiktok.content:
"But seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you." Matthew 6:33

As we pursue God's kingdom, we must recognize that His rule is not just a future reality, but a present reality that demands our allegiance.
